creator: andrews@TECHNOLOGIST.COM
text:
On Tue, Jul 18, 2000 at 10:34:57AM -0400, Mike Buchanon wrote:
> Update to rootail port
[..]
> Run this shell archive :)

When you update a port, you do NOT submit a shar containing the new
version.  You send a diff against the current version.  This is
necessary because we have to do in-place updates in order for CVS to
cooperate with the changes.

However, it is fairly trivial for us to create diffs given a shar.. ;)
But please send diffs in the future.

-- 
Will Andrews <andrewsw@purdue.edu> <will@FreeBSD.org>
